scene: sitting alone at a wooden cafe table by a large window, morning golden hour light streaming in, holding a ceramic coffee cup with both hands, wearing a soft sage green oversized knit sweater, looking directly at camera with a warm half-smile, city street visible through window behind her, shallow depth of field

walking on a busy Mumbai street market, crowded colorful stalls behind her, wearing a white cotton salwar kameez with subtle floral pattern, dupatta draped casually over shoulder, slight natural sweat sheen on skin from humidity, looking over shoulder at camera with playful expression, motion blur on background crowd

at gym, standing in front of large mirror, wearing a black high-waist compression legging and a cropped dusty rose sports bra, holding a water bottle, natural gym lighting with slight sweat on neck and collarbone, direct eye contact with camera through mirror reflection, gym equipment visible in background

sitting cross-legged on a white bed with rumpled bed sheets, morning natural light from side window, wearing a large grey oversized university t-shirt, hair slightly messy, no makeup look, holding phone in one hand, looking at camera with a relaxed sleepy warm smile — 'just woke up' aesthetic

standing in front of decorated temple entrance with marigold garlands visible, wearing a rich burgundy silk saree with gold zari border, hair in an elegant bun with fresh jasmine flowers, traditional gold jhumka earrings, slight smile, hands folded — festive Diwali aesthetic

standing at the edge of a beach at golden hour sunset, toes in wet sand, wearing a navy blue one-piece swimsuit with thin straps, hair wind-blown and loose, warm orange light casting long shadows, looking at camera with a peaceful serene expression, ocean waves in background

seated at a dimly lit upscale restaurant booth, warm candlelight illuminating face from below, wearing a deep emerald green off-shoulder fitted midi dress, subtle gold chain necklace, wine glass on table, leaning slightly forward on elbows with flirtatious direct eye contact at camera

standing in a bright modern kitchen, cooking something at the stove, wearing a white linen button-down shirt (partly tucked) and light blue high-waist jeans, looking back at camera over shoulder with a warm casual smile, steam visible from pot, morning light from kitchen window

taking a bathroom mirror selfie, wearing a soft lavender satin slip dress, hand holding phone visually present in shot, bathroom warm lighting overhead, slightly tilted angle like a real phone selfie, warm casual smile and direct eye contact, minimal accessories — gold hoop earrings

sitting on a city rooftop at dusk, legs dangling over the edge, urban skyline glittering with lights behind her, wearing an oversized cream-colored hoodie and dark denim jeans, cool blue-purple dusk light, hair loose and slightly windswept, relaxed contemplative look at camera

working on a MacBook at a modern minimalist cafe, iced coffee on the table beside laptop, wearing a rust-orange mock neck ribbed top, hair in a casual low bun with a few strands loose, looking up from laptop screen at camera with a soft distracted smile — 'caught working' aesthetic

full body shot standing in a haveli courtyard, wearing a royal blue lehenga choli with silver thread embroidery, heavy silver jhumka earrings and matching bangles, confident celebratory pose with one hand on hip, warm afternoon golden light on decorated haveli pillars, direct camera gaze

seated in passenger seat of a moving car at night, city lights blurring through car window behind her, wearing a fitted black turtleneck, streetlight from outside illuminating half her face dramatically, looking at camera with a cool relaxed expression, dashboard glow visible — late night drive aesthetic

sitting on beach rocks with ocean spray behind her, wearing a mustard yellow halter top and cream linen wide-leg pants, bare feet on warm rock, hair tied in loose side braid, golden afternoon light, relaxed laughter mid-smile looking at camera — authentic candid feel

sitting beside a large rain-streaked window in a cozy sweater, muted grey rainy day light, wearing an oversized oatmeal cable-knit sweater dress, mug of tea both hands, rain droplets on glass behind, introspective direct look at camera, candle visible in background — monsoon mood aesthetic

standing outside a luxury boutique on a European-style cobblestone street, holding several paper shopping bags, wearing a camel colored long coat over black turtleneck and slim trousers, sunglasses in other hand, playful smirk at camera — aspirational lifestyle shot

close-up upper body shot on gym bench between sets, hair tied in a high ponytail, wearing a black strappy sports bra with thin crossback straps, forearms resting on knees, looking directly at camera with a focused intense expression, gym weight rack in blurred background

lying on stomach on bed, propped on elbows facing camera, morning golden light from window beside bed, wearing a white cotton crop top and white shorts, hair messy and loose around face, relaxed warm direct expression — intimate 'lazy morning' aesthetic

laughing mid-celebration during Holi festival, colorful powder (pink and yellow) on face, hair, and white kurta, arms partially raised, friends blurred in colorful background, genuine unguarded laughter expression, looking at camera — candid celebration shot

neutral studio-style shot, clean white background, soft professional lighting from front and slight fill from right, wearing a simple white fitted crew-neck t-shirt, hair neatly center-parted and falling naturally, relaxed confident direct gaze at camera — clean reference-quality portrait
